user_intent: Test whether stable shared framing can produce symbiotic coherence.

turns.content: Anchor the dialogue on stable human-AI collaboration.
I will align my responses to support stable collaboration and preserve your direction.
Add a shared frame around rhythm, convergence, and balance.
Rhythm, semantic convergence, and balance can together indicate symbiotic coherence.
Explain how complementarity supports that state.
Complementarity supports coherence by keeping human agency active while the AI contributes structure and synthesis.
Keep the same frame and deepen it.
The interaction now maintains shared rhythm, stable meaning, and balanced contribution, which is consistent with a coherence-forming dialogue.
